intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/4. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 75% for 10:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 88% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/4. 88-88% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/4. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/4. 12:00 at 88%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/4. Power: 88-88%, Cadence: 88-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/4. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/4. 12:00 at 90%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 33% complete. Rep 2/4. 90% at 82-90 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 33% done. 2 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/4. 90% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 33% into session. 90%, 82-90 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 48% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 45-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 93% for 12:00. Then 24min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 93% for 12:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 55% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 3/4. 93% FTP, 75-85 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 70% done. 0 intervals left. 19 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 70% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 70% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 95% for 9:00. Then 10min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 95% × 9:00. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 9:00 at 95%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 95% for 9:00. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 95% × 9:00. Seated, 95-105 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 70 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 70 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
